default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot Usman's workflow bottlenecks and improve pipeline efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Usman's workload is unsustainable. His current process—using Claude for speed but Atlas for quality, then manually editing—causes burnout and rework.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Solution:** Migrate to agentic pipelines, which use a self-correcting loop (Draft → Evaluate → Improve) to automate fixes. This replaces manual editing with a fast, scalable process.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [**Action 1:** Create a dedicated "Comparison Articles" pipeline for the Exec client. This will embed a default comparison table template, eliminating repetitive manual setup for \~40 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Action 2:** Refine the Exec pipeline's "Proofreader Checklist" artifact. This post-processing step will automate fixes for common issues (e.g., m-dashes, hyperlink length), drastically reducing manual cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

## Topics

### Workflow Bottlenecks & Tooling Issues

  - [Usman's workload for clients Smith and Exec is unsustainable, leading to burnout.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Tooling Conflict:**](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Claude:** Fast for drafting, but output is repetitive and requires heavy manual editing.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Atlas:** Higher quality output, but the initial learning curve led to low trust and underuse.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Smith Pipeline Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [The current GenSeq pipeline splits artifacts (context, checklist) across multiple locations, making it hard to manage and causing missed instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [This forces Usman to use a simpler, but unsustainable, Claude-based process.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

### Agentic Pipeline Philosophy

  - [The core issue is using outdated, non-agentic pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [**Agentic pipelines are superior because they are self-correcting:**](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [They use a recursive loop: Draft → Evaluate → Improve.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - [The agent evaluates its own output against instructions and automatically fixes errors.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Key Principle:** The agent is a tool for *automation*, not a replacement for human judgment. The goal is to reduce manual work to a final 15-minute polish per article.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)

### Solution 1: Dedicated Comparison Article Pipeline

  - [**Problem:** The Exec client requires \~40 comparison articles, each needing a specific table format that Usman currently adds manually.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a dedicated agentic pipeline for "Comparison Articles."](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Why:** This embeds the comparison table template as a default in the pipeline's code, eliminating repetitive manual setup.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**How:** Use the Biologica pipeline's simple, effective assignment directions as a model.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Support:** Nana will assist with pipeline creation and template formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)

### Solution 2: Refine the Proofreader Checklist

  - [**Problem:** The Exec pipeline's "Proofreader Checklist" artifact is ineffective, forcing Usman to manually fix issues like m-dashes and long hyperlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [**Solution:** Refine the checklist to automate these fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
      - [**Why:** This post-processing step runs after the initial draft, catching and correcting errors the main drafter missed.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
      - [**How:**](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
        1.  [**Record Manual Fixes:** Document all common edits currently done in Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
        2.  [**Synthesize Instructions:** Convert these into clear, specific commands for the checklist artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
        3.  [**Test in Claude:** Validate the commands in a Claude project before implementing them in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
      - [**Example:** The Biologica checklist's m-dash rule is highly effective: "Never use m-dashes. Instead, use commas when adding supplementary information. Do not use parenthetical constructions."](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2968.0)
      - [Prioritize learning and improving agentic pipelines over debugging old ones.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
      - [Test the new Exec agentic pipeline with simpler, more focused assignment directions.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2926.0)
      - [Refine the Exec "Proofreader Checklist" artifact to automate common fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
      - [Request assistance from Nana for creating the "Comparison Articles" pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
  - [**Nana:**](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
      - [Assist Usman with creating the "Comparison Articles" pipeline for the Exec client.](https://fathom.video/share/gvaZec6jZkpkzJZNe3sHkAstW_4gqUrA?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)

action_items.description: Create Exec agentic article-gen pipeline for Usman; coordinate w/ Hassan/Nana
Create Comparison Articles pipeline w/ default table; coordinate w/ Nana
Recompose comparison-article assignment direction in Claude; then set as pipeline default
Update Exec proofreader checklist in Atlas artifacts; then move style rules from assignment direction
